title: Géométrie Clash GO!
description: Be careful! - Nerve cells do not regenerate after they die! Get to the top levels and beat your friend's records! Your goal is to maneuver between obstacles and collect coins. Seems simple at first glance, but its no cake walk. The coins are placed in hard-to-reach places that you will most certainly want to reach through the screen to the other side, grab the beard of the developer, just to stair in his eyes with total hatred. Nevertheless, you will play this game again and again and again, making progress.
